title: Body shimmer oil
subtitle: A light dry oil with pearlescent cosmetic mica for a subtle skin glow
excerpt: Fractionated coconut oil absorbs quickly without feeling greasy. Cosmetic mica at 2% gives a sheer pearlescent shimmer visible in sunlight and artificial light. A small amount of jojoba adds emolliency. Apply to collarbones, shoulders, and legs for an occasion-ready finish.
sourceNotes: Body shimmer oil formulation from Making Cosmetics guide (makingcosmetics.com, May 2026). Cosmetic mica usage rates from supplier datasheet. Fragrance dilution from Essential Oil Safety, Tisserand and Young (2014).

recipe.batchNotes: Scale proportionally. The mica settles on standing: shake before each use.
recipe.makeAheadNotes: Make ahead and store in a pump or dropper bottle. Shake well before use to redistribute the mica.
recipe.shelfLifeNotes: 18 months. The oils are the limiting factor. Fractionated coconut oil is stable but jojoba can slowly oxidise; store away from light and heat. Discard if the oil smells rancid.

recipeTools.notes: Or any small jug or beaker

glossaryTerms.definition: Fine pearlescent mineral powder coated with titanium dioxide or iron oxide for colour and shimmer. Batch-tested for heavy metals: only cosmetic-grade mica is safe for skin use. Not all mica is eye-safe; check the product specification before use near the eye area.

content.text: Body shimmer oils work because the carrier oil temporarily leaves a thin transparent film on the skin's surface that catches light, and the

particles within it reflect it. Fractionated coconut oil is the best base because it is light enough to form a very thin, even film rather than a visible grease layer. Keeping the mica at 2% gives a wearable day shimmer rather than the heavy glitter of a stage product.

Choose a silver or gold mica depending on your skin tone. Rose gold and pearl white mica are also common. Start with 2%: add up to 3% for a stronger effect. Above 3%, the particles become visible as individual flecks rather than a glow. The sweet orange essential oil is optional; omit for an unscented version.

items.prepNote: Adds emolliency and extends shelf life
2% shimmer; choose silver, gold, or rose gold cosmetic-grade mica
Optional; rinse-off use keeps phototoxicity risk low

content.text: Combine the fractionated coconut oil and jojoba oil in a jug. Add the cosmetic mica and stir vigorously until fully dispersed: mica particles tend to clump and need vigorous mixing. Add the vitamin E oil and the optional essential oil. Stir again. Pour into a pump or dropper bottle. Label with the date and shake before each use.
18 months in a cool, dark place. The mica settles to the bottom of the bottle: shake well before each use. Discard if the oil develops an off smell.
